text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF 27 CCW Chronic Conditions (CC) File Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.3 71 

HYPOTH_EVER 

LABEL: Date that beneficiary first met claims criteria for the acquired hypothyroidism indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This variable shows the date when the beneficiary first met the criteria for the Chronic Condition 
Warehouse (CCW) acquired hypothyroidism indicator. The variable will be blank for beneficiaries that 
have never had the condition. 

SHORT
